summary: Tested acknowledgement flow for Contract/Handbook and Equal Opportunities optional flag. All features working correctly: Contract and Handbook show 'Confirm & Complete' buttons (or 'Acknowledged' status after completion), Equal Opportunities shows 'Optional' badge with 'Does not affect compliance score' text, acknowledgement dialog works with checkbox requirement, and audit logs record acknowledgement_completed actions.

minor.issue: Audit log query by entity_id=employee_id doesn't return acknowledgement logs (entity_id is requirement_id like 'contract'/'handbook'). This is by design but may need documentation.

passed_tests: ✅ Contract is configured as 'acknowledgement' type in MANDATORY_ITEMS
✅ Handbook is configured as 'acknowledgement' type in MANDATORY_ITEMS
✅ Equal Opportunities is marked as optional (optional: true)
✅ Contract Acknowledgement shows 'Confirm & Complete' button (when not acknowledged)
✅ Employee Handbook Acknowledgement shows 'Confirm & Complete' button (when not acknowledged)
✅ Equal Opportunities shows 'Optional' badge
✅ Equal Opportunities shows 'Does not affect compliance score' text
✅ Acknowledge endpoint works for Contract (/api/employees/{id}/requirements/contract/acknowledge)
✅ Acknowledge endpoint works for Handbook (/api/employees/{id}/requirements/handbook/acknowledge)
✅ Non-acknowledgement type requirements correctly reject acknowledge requests (400 error)
✅ Acknowledged items show status='completed' and verified=True (auto-verified)
✅ Acknowledged items have has_evidence=True (acknowledgement counts as evidence)
✅ Optional items excluded from compliance total count
✅ Compliance percentage calculation is valid (0-100 range)
✅ Double acknowledgement is idempotent (returns success with 'already acknowledged' message)
✅ Audit log records 'acknowledgement_completed' action with employee_name, requirement_name, acknowledged_by, acknowledged_at
✅ Agreements section shows '2/2 approved' after both Contract and Handbook acknowledged
✅ Contract shows 'Checked & Approved' + 'Acknowledged' status badges
✅ Handbook shows 'Checked & Approved' + 'Acknowledged' status badges
✅ Compliance percentage increased from 69% to 78% after acknowledging Contract and Handbook
critical_code_review_comments: Acknowledgement flow correctly implemented: type='acknowledgement' in MANDATORY_ITEMS triggers 'Confirm & Complete' button instead of 'Upload Document'
Equal Opportunities correctly marked as optional: true with priority='optional' - excluded from compliance percentage calculation
Acknowledgement auto-verifies: When acknowledged, items are marked as both completed AND verified (no separate verification step needed)
Audit trail complete: acknowledgement_completed action logged with full context (employee_name, requirement_name, acknowledged_by, timestamp)

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - 1 test had incorrect query parameter)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing employee data (Olakunle Alonge). Contract and Handbook were acknowledged during backend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Acknowledgement flow fully tested and working. Contract and Handbook now show 'Acknowledged' status for Olakunle Alonge (employee_id: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77). Equal Opportunities is optional and shows 'Still Needed' with 'Upload Document' button (it's form-generated type, not acknowledgement type). Compliance increased from 69% to 78% after acknowledging Contract and Handbook. The acknowledge endpoint is at /api/employees/{employee_id}/requirements/{requirement_id}/acknowledge.
